name: Intelligent Systems
description: Nintendo-associated developer known for Fire Emblem, Paper Mario, WarioWare, and Nintendo development tools.

eras.title: Nintendo Tools and Famicom Era
eras.description: Early Nintendo support, programming tools, and technical work.

eras.title: Fire Emblem Foundation
eras.description: Creation and growth of Fire Emblem across Nintendo's 8-bit and 16-bit systems.

eras.title: Paper Mario and WarioWare Era
eras.description: Expansion into Mario RPGs, WarioWare, and broader Nintendo software.

eras.title: Modern Fire Emblem Era
eras.description: Fire Emblem's global revival and continued Nintendo collaboration.

notes: Modeled as a Nintendo child in this taxonomy because it functions as a Nintendo-associated internal/partner studio for browsing.
